evals.prompt: I need validate cert key pair for cert.pem and cert-key.pem.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-validate skill for this certificate validate request and produce the documented result for cert.pem and cert-key.pem.
expectations: Selects certificate-validate for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_validate_files.
Keeps the response focused on validating that a certificate and private key file match and are correctly formatted PEM files.

evals.prompt: Handle a focused certificate validate workflow for cert.pem and cert-key.pem; do not switch to a broader certificate audit unless it is required.
evals.expected_output: Use the certificate-validate skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects certificate-validate instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
